impact: The recent blocked task repeatedly failed because the worker wrote a mandatory import test for an optional future module. This repair gives the supervisor deterministic retry guidance: syntax-first tests for future modules must skip cleanly until the module exists, then compile and import only the target file. That lets the daemon resume useful validation-first work without broad extractor rewrites or repeated failing patches.
summary: Add a supervisor repair guide entry that tells PP&D daemon workers how to recover from syntax-first test failures when the target module does not exist yet.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-121: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad online trade permit requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
